title: Origin Realms Default Skins
description: Occasionally Changes Default Skins to have Overlays from Origin Realms.
body:
# Default skins are sorta boring.
**This Resourcepack changes your skin to have an overlay from the [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/) server when your skin is not loaded.**

Some examples include,
- 📹 While using the [Flashback Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) Editor
- 🛜 While Offline
- ⌚ If you're in a Queue for a Server
- 🤔 And many more Niche Senarios

**Assets used with permission from [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com/)!** 

RP doesn't work on a version I say it works on? RP works on a version I say it doesn't work  on? Please enlighten me on my [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/fJZbRfj5e4). 📎

Subscibe to my [youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@Whisdan)! 📺
